strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js, TypeScript, and React
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background with documented workshops and CI/CD practice
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in résumé
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
Cloud experience skewed to AWS only; no Docker/Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective deployment

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin signal

response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ year bar with senior/staff roles at Optilyz, RIDE, and re:cinq using the core TypeScript/Node/React stack, and the current re:cinq role explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP generators which maps directly to the AI agent requirement. Testing expertise is well-evidenced through TDD practice at RIDE and Selenium/Vitest-adjacent workshop history. Gaps are Nest.js (not named anywhere) and Kotlin (skills list omits it; Java work is older), plus thin Kubernetes evidence — these are learnable for a senior but lower the score from a clear yes.
